comment_text.sn12.34:3.13: The natural principles themselves do not disappear, for it is always true to describe the world as suffering and impermanent. But the knowledge of that is impermanent, for it is a conscious state and will pass away when the enlightened being passes away.

root_text.sn12.34:1.3: Taṁ suṇātha, sādhukaṁ manasi karotha, bhāsissāmī”ti.
root_text.sn12.34:1.4: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṁ.
root_text.sn12.34:2.4: atītampi addhānaṁ jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇanti ñāṇaṁ, asati jātiyā natthi jarāmaraṇanti ñāṇaṁ;
root_text.sn12.34:2.5: anāgatampi addhānaṁ jātipaccayā jarāmaraṇanti ñāṇaṁ, asati jātiyā natthi jarāmaraṇanti ñāṇaṁ;
root_text.sn12.34:2.6: yampissa taṁ dhammaṭṭhitiñāṇaṁ tampi khayadhammaṁ vayadhammaṁ virāgadhammaṁ nirodhadhammanti ñāṇaṁ.
root_text.sn12.34:3.10: avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ, asati avijjāya natthi saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ;
root_text.sn12.34:3.11: atītampi addhānaṁ avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ, asati avijjāya natthi saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ;
root_text.sn12.34:3.12: anāgatampi addhānaṁ avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ, asati avijjāya natthi saṅkhārāti ñāṇaṁ;
root_text.sn12.34:3.13: yampissa taṁ dhammaṭṭhitiñāṇaṁ tampi khayadhammaṁ vayadhammaṁ virāgadhammaṁ nirodhadhammanti ñāṇaṁ.

translation_text.sn12.34:1.2: “Mendicants, I will teach seventy-seven grounds for knowledge.
translation_text.sn12.34:1.3: Listen and apply your mind well, I will speak.”
translation_text.sn12.34:2.1: “And what are the seventy-seven grounds for knowledge?
translation_text.sn12.34:2.2: The knowledge that rebirth is a requirement for old age and death,
translation_text.sn12.34:2.3: and the knowledge that when rebirth doesn’t exist, there is no old age and death.
translation_text.sn12.34:2.4: Also regarding the past: the knowledge that rebirth is a requirement for old age and death, and the knowledge that when rebirth doesn’t exist, there is no old age and death.
translation_text.sn12.34:2.5: Also regarding the future: the knowledge that rebirth is a requirement for old age and death, and the knowledge that when rebirth doesn’t exist, there is no old age and death.
translation_text.sn12.34:2.6: And also their knowledge that even this knowledge of the stability of natural principles is liable to end, vanish, fade away, and cease.
translation_text.sn12.34:3.1: The knowledge that continued existence is a requirement for rebirth …
translation_text.sn12.34:3.10: The knowledge that ignorance is a requirement for choices, and the knowledge that when ignorance doesn’t exist, there are no choices.
translation_text.sn12.34:3.11: Also regarding the past: the knowledge that ignorance is a requirement for choices, and the knowledge that when ignorance doesn’t exist, there are no choices.
translation_text.sn12.34:3.12: Also regarding the future: the knowledge that ignorance is a requirement for choices, and the knowledge that when ignorance doesn’t exist, there are no choices.
translation_text.sn12.34:3.13: And also their knowledge that even this knowledge of the stability of natural principles is liable to end, vanish, fade away, and cease.
translation_text.sn12.34:3.14: These are called the seventy-seven grounds for knowledge.”
